title: lipochaeta micrantha var. micrantha
intro: Lipochaeta micrantha var. micrantha is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the Hawaiian fleabane or small-flowered Lipochaeta. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lipochaeta micrantha var. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for consumption through herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which have been used to treat various health conditions in Hawaiian traditional medicine.
